steps.title: Identify the grammatical relationship
steps.content: The barnacles use secretions to “attach ______ to a sea turtle shell.” The blank represents what's being attached; since the barnacles are attaching themselves (subject and object are the same), we need a pronoun that refers back to the plural subject.

steps.title: Apply the reflexive pronoun rule
steps.content:
For a plural subject acting on itself, the reflexive form is “themselves.” “Themselves” correctly shows the barnacles acting on themselves: “they attach themselves to a sea turtle shell.” The other choices are either singular (“it,” “itself”) or non-reflexive (“them”).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
